Name: $ArmoredFuelCell_M
Description:
Provides the same energy capacity as a conventional Fuel Cell, with extra armor plating. Relatively heavy.

Often seen on heavier ship, these fuel cells adds extra bulk to a ship against enemy fire. 

Also used by heavier merchant convoys to survive pirate raids better, but the weight also makes such equipments a potential risk to captains - speed can mean a difference between life and death.
